title: cenchrus elegans
intro: Cenchrus elegans, also known as the elegant spurge grass or silver beard grass, is a species of grass in the family Poaceae. It is native to tropical and subtropical regions of Africa and Asia. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. In herbal preparations, Cenchrus elegans can be used to make teas, infusions, and extracts, which are believed to provide health benefits such as reducing fever, relieving pain, and supporting digestive health.
